likely_response.local: Nas máquinas junto à saída P1.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh PEH OOM.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the parking lot and use the payment machine.

responses.english: Go to the parking lot and use the payment machine.
responses.phonetic: NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh PEH OOM.
responses.french: Nas máquinas junto à saída P1.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Viasca bus at gate 4?
phrases.text_local: Onde está o autocarro da Viasca na porta 4?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW ow-too-KAH-roo DUH VEEAHSH-kuh NUH PAW-ruh-tuh KWAHT-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: A saída de chegadas é separada, e o autocarro Viasca para na porta 4.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à porta 4 para o autocarro Viasca.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH PAW-ruh-tuh KWAHT-roo PUH-ruh AW ow-too-KAH-roo VEEAHSH-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to gate 4 for the Viasca bus.

responses.english: Go to gate 4 for the Viasca bus.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH PAW-ruh-tuh KWAHT-roo PUH-ruh AW ow-too-KAH-roo VEEAHSH-kuh.
responses.french: Dirija-se à porta 4 para o autocarro Viasca.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de segurança?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Security Post.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Security Post.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Posto de Segurança.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the fixed taxi stand?
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de táxis fixos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH TAHK-seesh FEEK-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff avoid pleasantries beyond the mandatory greeting, focusing on outdoor markers.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Caixa de táxis fixos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KEYE-shuh DIH TAHK-seesh FEEK-soosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fixed Taxi Counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fixed Taxi Counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KEYE-shuh DIH TAHK-seesh FEEK-soosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Caixa de táxis fixos.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Azores Airlines counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão da Azores Airlines?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DUH uh-ZOH-rihsh uhee-ruh-LEE-nihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Airline counters are typically grouped; staff give precise hall references.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão Azores Airlines.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN uh-ZOH-rihsh uhee-ruh-LEE-nihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Azores Airlines counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Azores Airlines counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN uh-ZOH-rihsh uhee-ruh-LEE-nihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão Azores Airlines.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the security checkpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de segurança?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Security checkpoints in Portuguese airports are usually located after the main entrance, clearly signposted.

likely_response.translation_en: In the central corridor, on the right.

responses.english: In the central corridor, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o autocarro da Viasca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW ow-too-KAH-roo DUH VEEAHSH-kuh?

likely_response.local: O autocarro da Viasca parte da porta 4. Siga as placas para o balcão Viasca se precisar de mais ajuda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW ow-too-KAH-roo DUH VEEAHSH-kuh PAH-ruh-tih DUH PAW-ruh-tuh KWAHT-roo. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN VEEAHSH-kuh SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The Viasca bus departs from gate 4. Follow the signs to the Viasca counter if you need further assistance.

responses.english: The Viasca bus departs from gate 4. Follow the signs to the Viasca counter if you need further assistance.
responses.phonetic: AW ow-too-KAH-roo DUH VEEAHSH-kuh PAH-ruh-tih DUH PAW-ruh-tuh KWAHT-roo. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN VEEAHSH-kuh SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh.
responses.french: O autocarro da Viasca parte da porta 4. Siga as placas para o balcão Viasca se precisar de mais ajuda.
